data.body: ALL COMPLETE. Final state (verify-signature --kind completion-verifier): epic 8d27, story 297d, all 7 identity tasks (bffe/ad42/472f/cc0b/245e/1787/9e76), CI-signing bug ad48, and doc task 3584 = ALL closed + CERTIFIED. Config-prune stories certified+landed earlier. Changes landed: config-prune stack (6), identity stack (6), ad48 CI-signing fix (681), client doc (682). Caching-investigation bug 8d44 left OPEN for a separate session (per user). Per-environment signing validated: LOCAL signs+verifies; CI (canary f436) signs+verifies after the ad48 job-level-env fix; AWS review-bot attribution config landed (deploy-verified). Generic secret-free client guide docs/identity-setup.md landed + linked. Terraform: real key in the declared SSM param — import (don't recreate). Correction: earlier 'unsigned' reports were a verification-method error (rebar show --output llm attestations field vs the authoritative verify-signature); documented in bug 8d44.
